company.what_they_do: TestnHire is an AI-powered, skill-based pre-employment talent assessment platform. It allows employers to create and assign online skill assessments to candidates before interviews, replacing resume-based screening with objective, data-driven evaluations. The platform offers a library of 400+ expert-built tests spanning programming, cognitive ability, language proficiency, situational judgment, and role-specific skills. Key features include: AI candidate matching (behavioral + technical alignment), AI-driven video interview setup, automated proctoring, bulk candidate invitations, AI-generated performance reports, and intelligent scoring to surface top candidates. It serves startups, enterprises, and hiring agencies. The company claims 300+ companies as customers and positions itself as a faster, fairer alternative to traditional hiring.
raw_notes: 400+ tests created by 50+ subject matter experts
Core product pillars: Comprehensive Test Library, AI Candidate Matching, AI Interview Setup, Proctoring Settings, AI-Powered Insights, AI Screening
Value props for employers: faster hiring, reduced mis-hires, lower overhead/turnover costs, affordable/pay-as-you-go pricing
Value props for candidates: skills-first evaluation, constructive feedback, fair/bias-free assessment
3-step workflow: Invite Candidates → Analyze Results → Hire
Competes directly with TestGorilla, Testlify, Codility, eSkill, Mettl, Harver, HireVue (per their own comparison pages)
Test categories include: programming (20+ languages), cognitive ability, language/linguistics, and custom role-specific tests
Bulk invite capability; real-time dashboard tracking
Claims to reduce mis-hires and hiring time
Headquartered in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India (per Crunchbase)
Parent company appears to be Drift Point Technologies (per Stackforce and LinkedIn profile of Ashish Jain)
Drift Point Technologies also has a separate product: W3 Speedster (a WordPress speed optimization plugin)
Blog active as of March 2026; YouTube presence confirmed (video from August 2025)
Listed on Capterra and Crunchbase; described as 'active' operating status
Capterra listing dated June 2026, confirming recent activity
